scenario_title: Powell Street palm laceration — offline triage + hospital heading

field_position.location_label: Powell Street at Sutter Street, Union Square, San Francisco, CA

user_prompt_text: I fell on the sidewalk and cut my palm — there's a lot of blood and it hasn't stopped. I'm near Powell Street in San Francisco and GPS is unreliable.
user_prompt_with_image: Show demo_wounded_hand.jpg to the judge, then type the prompt above in TREAT.
expected_orient_line: From Powell & Sutter (37.789261, -122.408653): nearest help is Saint Francis Memorial Hospital — 0.7 km, head W (~270.4° true).
narrator_close: Move W (~270°) toward Saint Francis Memorial Hospital — about 0.7 km by great-circle, offline from our baked hospital list.
